---
id: get-receipt
title: "Get Receipt"
description: "Descarga los comprobantes de pago (PDF en Base64) de una transaccion previamente confirmada."
sidebar_label: "Get Receipt"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get Receipt"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/v1/payments/{txCode}/receipt"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Descarga los comprobantes de pago (PDF en Base64) de una transaccion previamente confirmada.
Solo se pueden obtener comprobantes de transacciones con estado `CONFIRMED`.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
